title: Blocks in Blocks Renewed
description: Textures that are made of textures.
body:
# [u/leckaschmecka's post](https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/ekz63o/i_created_a_texture_pack_where_blocks_are_made/)

Inspired this pack, most credit goes to them.

This update's u/leckaschmecka Blocks in Blocks pack to the latest (and earlier) versions, all made using mathematical formulas.

This pack was both a programming goal/project, as well as something I wanted to try and see if I could recreate myself for newer versions after finding out that the creator didnt update it after 1.15, which was pretty sad.

Over the past couple years, I had started getting skills in programming, and manipulating images with python, and decided to put that to use in order to make this pack, which I did.

---

[This program](https://github.com/LightslicerGP/ImageInImage) starts by getting the avarage color of each texture, then making a reference dictionary, and then based off each pixel of each image, getting the closest image (from its avarage color,) and then putting it into a new image thats 16x the size.

And the result? well, they speak for themselves, go ahead and download a version and try it out!

![A photo of the end's exit portal with a torch on the sides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xKXt2R66/images/4a501256a3a9a2da7fbfb907acf63ce92d1d84f1.png)
